name: tlpe-manager
description: TLPE Manager - Logiciel de gestion de la Taxe Locale sur la Publicité Extérieure

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=server && npm install --workspace=client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.test:coverage:server: rm -rf coverage/server && npx --yes c8 --report-dir coverage/server --reporter=text-summary --reporter=json-summary npm run test --workspace=server
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:server && npm run test:coverage:client
